description: §19.7.1/.3 — a logic-context `match` over a failable-call result (`loadThing(id)! LoadError`) MUST exhaustively cover the implicit `::Ok` success variant AND every declared error variant. This match covers `::Ok` and `::NotFound` but OMITS `::Timeout`, so exhaustiveness (§18.8) fires E-TYPE-020. Before the D-ERR-1 fix the failable-call scrutinee was never lifted to the `::Ok | <errors>` union, so the missing error variant fell through silently.
rationale: §19.7.1: matching the result of a `!` function call follows the existing exhaustive matching rules (§18.8); all variants — both success and error — MUST be covered. Missing an error variant SHALL trigger E-TYPE-020.
